mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_sessions (session_id, user_id, title) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{title})
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, user_id, title, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (session_id, role, content) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT message_id, session_id, role, content, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at
